I have never been a moderator before so this is really my only way to get it so these are my reasons to be a moderator.
1i will be active on the game all the time.
2i will make videos to try and get people to download the game.
3i will also help people who are new and need help around.
3i will not ban people who aren’t doing anything wrong.
4i will take everything seriously and make sure that nobody in the lobby I’m in is getting bullied by anyone else.
5i will have a good time with other members who are moderators and maybe even make a few friends.
6i will take care and Appreciate it if you can give me the moderator.
